arts.ttl: Agreement for wonderkid Man Utd target expected THIS WEEK
arts.sum: Manchester United target Rodrigo Mora is expected to sign his new Porto contract this week, according to a report. The situation is only going to become even more difficult later this week when Mora is expected to put pen to paper on a new deal with his boyhood club.

arts.ttl: Manchester United supporters deliver Andre Onana verdict as Ruben Amorim makes Lyon stance clear
arts.sum: Andre Onana is set to return for Manchester United against Lyon on Thursday night

arts.ttl: Richard Keys: Amorim Gives Man Utd Two Reasons to Sack Him
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has suffered a poor start to his Man Utd career and that has seen Richard Keys tear into him

arts.ttl: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim issues Joshua Zirkzee injury update ahead of Lyon showdown
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim confirms that Dutch forward Joshua Zirkzee will be missing for the remainder of the season.

arts.ttl: Harry Maguire gives brutal verdict on Man Utd's season - 'No doubt about it'
arts.sum: Manchester United have endured an awful season this season, with veteran defender and former captain Harry Maguire pulling no punches in his assessment of their campaign

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim’s decision to recall Andre Onana could prove season-defining for Man United
arts.sum: Onana was left out of the squad for last weekend’s trip to Newcastle after an erroneous display in the first leg

arts.ttl: Chelsea lead four-team transfer race for Liam Delap as Man Utd hit by trump card
arts.sum: Liam Delap has shone despite Ipswich struggling in the Premier League with Chelsea leading Manchester United in the battle to sign the English forward this summer

arts.ttl: Report Manchester United target Maignan to replace flop Onana
arts.sum: After ex-Inter goalkeeper Andre Onana flopped, Manchester United are reportedly looking to Milan’s Mike Maignan...

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford's true feelings on Aston Villa stay after leaving Man Utd
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford left Manchester United at the start of the year with the aim of reviving his career and has excelled since joining Aston Villa on loan with a huge summer decision lying ahead

arts.ttl: Scott McTominay earns big licks over Napoli form as Chelsea legend tells Man United 'I don't get it'
arts.sum: The Scotland star has been earning rave reviews in Serie A and has firmly established himself as a fans' favourite in Naples
